siteInfo.tagline: Accommodation Made Easy, Especially for FFDG
siteInfo.subtitle: Accommodation Page
siteInfo.introText: Browse hotels, motels, and short-term furnished houses below, then click through to book.

listings.name: Super 8 by Wyndham Deadwood/Black Hills Area
listings.description: Budget-friendly hotel on the Mickelson Trail with an indoor pool, hot tub, on-site casino, and free continental breakfast.

listings.name: Deadwood Gulch Resort, Trademark Collection by Wyndham
listings.description: Resort along Whitewood Creek with a 24/7 casino, fitness center, hot tub, and rooms featuring mini-fridges and microwaves.

listings.name: Comfort Inn & Suites Deadwood
listings.description: Smoke-free hotel with an indoor heated pool, hot tub, fitness center, free hot breakfast, and on-site lounge.

listings.name: Grand Cozy Retreat in Downtown Lead
listings.description: Entire home minutes from Deadwood and the Black Hills. Sleeps up to 6 with 2 bedrooms, 3 beds, and 1 bath, plus a fully equipped kitchen, in-unit washer/dryer, and a fenced patio with gas grill.

listings.name: Renovated Condo in Lead
listings.description: Recently renovated 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo with two king beds, full kitchen, AC, electric fireplace, and a patio with city views. 5 minutes to Deadwood's casinos and 10 minutes to Terry Peak Ski Area.

listings.name: Whiskey Water Condo
listings.description: Charming 2-bedroom vacation condo in the heart of Lead, sleeps 5 with 3 beds and 1 bath. Full kitchen with breakfast bar, gas fireplace, private patio with mountain views, and free parking.
